reviews.comment:
El servicio de los playeros bien!!!
El BAÑO que da a la calle un ASCO!!!! Sin agua entra cualquier cantidad de gente qué pasa por la calle que no carga combustible y dejan el baño una  inmundicia!!!! Con toda la plata que levantan podrían poner algo mejor los baños sin manija ni papel y de 2 solo funciona 1 !!! A ponerle pilas!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service from the gas station attendants was great!
The bathroom facing the street is disgusting! There's no water, and all sorts of people who aren't filling up use it, leaving it filthy! With all the money they make, they could do something better. The bathrooms don't have handles or toilet paper, and only one of the two stalls works! They need to get their act together!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NHJIdjZ3RRAB
